title: Runtime Baseline, Decision Harness, And Contract Map
purpose: Inventory current Body/M/epi-tauri build/command/event/service-client surfaces, author the three load-bearing ADRs (Theia runtime mode / single-vs-multi-webview / bridge ownership), map Theia plan tranches to Track 01-04 dependency gates, and define the local-dev topology for M5-3 tests.

inventory_cross_references.renderer_and_command_surface: Body/M/epi-tauri/contract-inventory/track-06-baseline.json — 62 Tauri commands across 12 modules, 12 frontend services, 6 stores, 9 shell/panel/domain surfaces, vitest 17/17 + cargo 44/44 verified.
inventory_cross_references.pratibimba_extension_seam: Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/contracts/07-t0-extension-contract-preflight.json (6 individual extensions over KernelBridgeAPI) + 08-t0-composition-contract-preflight.json (2 integrated plugins composing over the same bridge).
inventory_cross_references.S0_profile_baseline: Body/S/S0/portal-core/contract-inventory/baseline-profile.json + track-01-baseline.json (real-code generated MathemeHarmonicProfile, public-current, no protected-local leakage).
inventory_cross_references.S2_graph_authority: Body/S/S2/graph-schema/contract-inventory/track-02-authority-drift.json (schema versions + 17 registered relationship types vs 11 seed-emitted + 8 carried blockers).
inventory_cross_references.S4_S5_mediation_authority: Body/S/S5/epii-agent/contract-ledger/track-09-preflight.json (11 gateway methods, 3 forbidden_authority, Aletheia as S4 tool-guardian per S4-5p-aletheia CONTRACT.md).

tauri_shell.test_runner: cargo test --manifest-path Body/M/epi-tauri/src-tauri/Cargo.toml (44/44 passing as of 2026-06-01)

adrs.title: Theia runtime mode
adrs.summary: Theia browser-mode-in-Tauri-webview vs Tauri-supervised localhost Theia server vs Tauri-spawned Theia Electron sidecar.
adrs.recommended_default: Prototype browser-mode-in-webview first; fallback to supervised localhost browser-mode if direct asset loading fails; treat Electron sidecar as last resort.

adrs.title: Single vs multi-webview navigation
adrs.summary: IDE summon: navigate existing webview / open second Tauri window-webview / keep `/body` in tray-background while Theia foregrounds.
adrs.recommended_default: Multi-webview with `/body` capable of tray/background persistence, provided the prototype proves shared bridge identity and acceptable resource behavior.

adrs.title: Kernel-bridge host boundary
adrs.summary: Long-lived shared bridge owned by Theia first-loaded extension / Tauri Rust process / hybrid Tauri singleton with Theia and `/body` adapters.
adrs.recommended_default: Hybrid Tauri singleton plus stable Theia-native `KernelBridgeAPI` adapter — best satisfies one-app shared instance, `/body` lite mode, and Theia DI consumption.

tranche_dependency_map.rule: Every Track 05 downstream tranche names its Track 01-04 dependency gate. No tranche is unblocked unless that dependency is implemented OR represented as explicit readiness-blocked.

T3_shared_kernel_bridge_adapter.blocker: Track 01 T5-T7 + Track 03 T1-T5 not landed

local_dev_topology.rule: Mirror Track 09's local harness expectation: every M5-3 tranche names exactly which services it needs running, which can be stubbed, and what blocked-state the surface shows when a service is absent. No silent fallback to mocked success.

services.purpose: Host the Wry/WebKit webview(s) for /body and (eventually) /pratibimba/system
Theia browser-mode workbench host (ADR-05-001 decides exact form)

services.start: epi gate serve (TBD specific port from Track 03)

EPI_GRAPH_LIVE.purpose: Enable live-Neo4j gated integration tests in Body/S/S2/graph-services

readiness_blockers_carried_forward.summary: Bridge host boundary — ADR-05-003 open. Track 06, 07, 08, 09 all blocked on this for finalized subscription economy.
Theia extension API, version, package manager, build composition.
Track 01-04 contract readiness before UI hardening.
spacetime.rs treats native WebSocket as stub; T3+ blocked on Track 03 T3.
S5 persisted review/autoresearch stores not yet wired to /pratibimba/system; T8 blocked on Track 04 T6-T7.

commands.cmd: pnpm --dir Body/M/epi-tauri test (or npm run test --prefix Body/M/epi-tauri equivalent)
commands.result_at_06_T0: vitest 17/17 across 6 files (rerun not required after 06.T0; no source changes here)

commands.cmd: ADRs name selected prototype commands, ports, CSP requirements, service dependencies, pass/fail criteria
commands.result: ADR-05-001/002/003 authored as Open with recommended defaults

commands.cmd: No Theia tranche marked unblocked unless its Track 01-04 dep is implemented or marked readiness-blocked
commands.result: tranche_dependency_map records 05.T3 onward as can_start=false with explicit blockers
